Using `LINK.fields()` returns all columns from the LINK table, which is an implicit column selection. Explicitly list only the columns needed (e.g., `LINK.ID, LINK.URL, LINK.LAST_CHECK_TIME, LINK.UPDATED_AT, LINK.UPDATES_COUNT`) instead of using `fields()`.
